en.name: Wordscapes
en.desc: Connect letters to form words and fill the crossword!
en.description: Wordscapes is a relaxing word puzzle game where you connect letters from a wheel to form words and fill in a crossword grid. Discover all the hidden words in each level to progress through increasingly challenging puzzles.
en.objectives: Find all hidden words by connecting letters from the wheel. Fill in the crossword grid to complete each level. Progress through levels of increasing difficulty.
en.howToPlay: Click on letters in the wheel to form words. Words must be at least 3 letters long. Found words fill into the crossword grid. Find all words to complete the level.

rules.controls: Click letters in sequence to form words. Click Submit to check your word. Click Clear to start over.
mechanics: Words must be at least 3 letters long
Each letter can only be used once per word
Found words fill the crossword grid
Find all words to complete the level

tips: Look for common word endings like -ing, -ed, -s
Use the crossword clues to guide your search

faq.question: How do I form a word?
faq.answer: Click on letters in the wheel in sequence. When you've spelled a word, click Submit to check it.

faq.question: What if my word isn't accepted?
faq.answer: Make sure your word is at least 3 letters long and uses only the letters available in the wheel.

faq.question: How do I complete a level?
faq.answer: Find all the words that fit in the crossword grid. The level is complete when all spaces are filled.

zh.name: 字母组词
zh.desc: 连接字母组成单词填满填字格！
zh.description: Wordscapes是一款轻松的单词益智游戏，你从字母轮盘中连接字母组成单词并填入填字格。发现每关所有隐藏的单词来逐渐挑战更难的谜题。
zh.objectives: 通过连接字母轮盘中的字母找出所有隐藏的单词。填满填字格完成每关。通过难度递增的关卡。
zh.howToPlay: 点击轮盘中的字母组成单词。单词至少需要3个字母。找到的单词会填入填字格。找出所有单词完成关卡。

rules.controls: 按顺序点击字母组成单词。点击提交检查你的单词。点击清除重新开始。
mechanics: 每个字母在每个单词中只能使用一次
找到的单词填入填字格
找出所有单词完成关卡

tips: 寻找常见的单词结尾如-ing、-ed、-s
利用填字格的提示指导你的搜索

faq.question: 如何组成单词？
faq.answer: 按顺序点击轮盘中的字母。当你拼出一个单词后，点击提交来检查它。

faq.question: 如果我的单词不被接受怎么办？
faq.answer: 确保你的单词至少有3个字母，并且只使用轮盘中可用的字母。

faq.question: 如何完成关卡？
faq.answer: 找出所有适合填字格的单词。当所有空格都填满时关卡完成。
